title: Siemens U273 B11 S6 contact/load bound sweep
status: bounded sensitivity because exact S6/S7 contacts are not readable in available crops
warning: R1/R2 are applied as possible simple shunt loads at VR. R2 is corrected to the 1 MOhm adjustable value visible in the global crop. This is a bound, not a confirmed contact table.

contactHypotheses.name: core_all_branches
contactHypotheses.note: Current provisional S6 core: LM, MR, LR and VM-to-ground RC branch active.

contactHypotheses.name: core_without_lr_bridge
contactHypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: LR bridge R5/C3 open.

contactHypotheses.name: core_without_m0_shunt
contactHypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: VM-to-ground R6/C4 branch open.

contactHypotheses.name: core_series_lm_mr_only
contactHypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: only LM and MR paths active.

loadHypotheses.name: r1r2_open
loadHypotheses.note: No R1/R2 load applied at VR.

loadHypotheses.name: r1_3k
loadHypotheses.note: R1=3 kOhm applied as a shunt load at VR.

loadHypotheses.name: r2_1M
loadHypotheses.note: R2=1 MOhm adjustable applied as a shunt load at VR.

loadHypotheses.name: r1_r2_series_1003k
loadHypotheses.note: R1+R2=1.003 MOhm applied as a shunt load at VR.

loadHypotheses.name: r1_r2_parallel_2k991
loadHypotheses.note: R1||R2=2.991 kOhm applied as a shunt load at VR.
